title: No attack time delay
description: Reverts combat system to pre-1.9. Supports 1.21.3
body:
This data pack/mod removes the temporary invincibility timer that players get when hitting mobs

Can also be used in other multiplayer

How to apply
1. Download the file
2. Unzip it
(You can put it as a zip file)
3. Put it in a new data pack folder
4. Run /reload in the new folder
5. It's hard!!!

1.21.3 support
